description: DK 184a: Copy of a letter from Sharira b. Hananya, while he was a judge (Av Beit Din) in the yeshiva of Pumbedita, to the communities in Spain and North Africa. Dating of the original letter: ca. 962. The writer asks for their support, while in the Yeshiva there are disagreements about their Gaon – Nehemya b. Kohen Sedek. (Gil, Kingdom, vol. 2, Doc. #19) VMR
description_he: העתק מכתב משרירא בן חנניה, שהיה דיין בישיבת פומבדיתא, לקהילות בספרד ובצפון אפריקה, כ-962, על מחלוקת בישיבה
